overview: Audit REST API for the NetApp Console

ai-gen.title: Retrieve an Audit service account record
ai-gen.summary: Retrieve account records using a specified account public ID.
ai-gen.keywords: audit records,account records,account public ID,netapp console,user token,from last modified,to last modified,start time,user audits,user data
ai-gen.lead: Retrieves account records by a specified account public ID so you can access detailed account information for auditing purposes.

ai-gen.title: Retrieve an Audit service API record
ai-gen.summary: Retrieve audit records using account, service, and request ID.
ai-gen.keywords: audit records,account records,service records,request records,netapp console,account service,request id,netapp ontap,record retrieval
ai-gen.lead: Retrieves specified records in the Audit service API by account, service, and request ID so you can monitor and analyze audit logs for security and compliance purposes.

ai-gen.title: Retrieve an Audit Service API filter option
ai-gen.summary: Retrieve filter options for a specified account ID.
ai-gen.keywords: filter options,audit options,account filter,netapp console,account id,netapp audit,filter retrieval,netapp options
ai-gen.lead: Retrieves audit filter options for a specified account ID, allowing you to view and manage audit configurations within the Audit service API.
